Brell's Fishing Pole + Homemade bait, skill 206.
loc -3471, 9390, -32, The Iceclad Ocean
Took me 5 minutes to get 3 of these.

15 min
QuoteReply
# May 04 2012 at 11:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1647821783460
Scholar
42 posts
It took about 15 min on a Druid with 200 fishing, 206 with Brell's Fishin' Pole 3% modifier.
I just picked a random spot in Iceland and didnt move. -2385 pos 8691 if anyone cares.
▲ Page top
fish where u want
QuoteReply
# Oct 04 2004 at 8:21 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591796514348
57 posts
Ok for prob the gazzillionth time ...... SoE random number generator subroutine (which if i am not mistaken is made by microsoft) is very streaky. I have yet to not see any kind of RANDOMNESS to it.... Ill either fail 50 times in a row adn then succed 10 times in a row...or i will come in a zone cast my rod and get what i am after on the first attempt. It does NOT matter where u are in this zone. You have the same CHANCE to catch this at all times. Caught 3 on pier by translocator within 10 minutes of zoning in...had spent 4 hours the other night there and got zilch
▲ Page top
Skill Not Nessisary
QuoteReply
# Sep 16 2004 at 10:25 AM Rating: Decent

View User Forum
80 posts
I got a cutlass cod with skill of 3. Never had much use for a pole till I started 7th shawl quest. ;)

# Sep 01 2004 at 10:19 AM Rating: Decent

29 posts
i had about 30 attemts fail near the port in spot befor i moved to the small islands and got a cutless on the second try

Edited, Wed Sep 1 11:20:59 2004
▲ Page top
RNG...
QuoteReply
# Mar 13 2004 at 3:44 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255654740
View User Forum
44 posts
I'm 200 in Fishing and have been for some time. I've never seen anything that leads me to believe that location within a particular zone has anything to do with the chance of catching anything.

I have no numbers to back me up, but that's been my experience.
▲ Page top
"Fishing" for info
QuoteReply
# Jan 11 2004 at 7:34 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592260929146
View User Forum
10 posts
Did not find a whole lot of information on these, so I'm posting my experience in the hopes that it will help other people out. I started out approx /loc n5625, p9025 just south of the bridge suggested in a previous post. I had six regular fishing poles and four stacks of catch-a-lot bait. Starting skill was 56. I did not know about roamers in this area of the zone so cast levitation on myself and headed out over the water to be "safer".

- Caught my first Cutlassfish at 17 minutes - skill 76.
- Caught second at 30 minutes - skill 86
- Caught third at 35 minutes - skill 90

Read somewhere you needed around a 130-140 fishing skill to catch these. This has either been nerfed or is just not true.

All totaled: 35 minutes
5 sandals
11 rusty daggers
11 fresh fish
6 salty something fish (forget the exact name)
3 Iceclad Cutlassfish
used 44 pieces of bait
1 broken pole
34 skill points

Hope this helps - was very painless imho.
▲ Page top
RE:
QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2004 at 5:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591802368566
9 posts
With 200 skill, I've found that the fishing rates vary drastically, no matter where you fish. My most classic example wa the night I thought that dexterity was the key when I was singing (bard 63) my dexterity song by happenstance and fished over 100 Storm Salmon out of the zonein point to Plane of Storms in the same time it took to fish 25 on the previous night. The following night in the same amount of time I only managed to fish out about 45. In all 3 cases I was maxed out in fishing skill, using the same bait and fishing pole. I tried again tonight with dex song and got over 75 in same time period. IMHO it's just luck. However, skill does play a big part if you are not maxed out. There are simply some things you cannot fish with low skill, and with high skill as well. It's almost impossible for me to get fish scales in most places that I used to get them if there are specialty items available.
▲ Page top
near bridge to EW
QuoteReply
# Nov 08 2003 at 10:10 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1662941905530
Scholar
164 posts
had pretty good luck just south of the giant bridge to EW. small sheltered valley along the shoure, vicinity N5659, 8906, sort of like a finger cove. Had no wandering mobs stumble on me there either.
▲ Page top
Location
QuoteReply
# Jun 13 2003 at 9:14 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592256227210
7 posts
I think it has to do with the location too, was in middle of the zone, at evac spot and didn't get anything, then I moved to eastern isle and got a few pretty fast.
▲ Page top
Easy
QuoteReply
# Mar 29 2003 at 8:01 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592255258681
15 posts
Dunno, but at fishing lvl 110, with common pole and catch a lot of bait. I caught 3 cutlass in 10 mins.

I went all the way to the eastern most tip island in Iceclad, not sure if location has something to do with it, but maybe I was lucky?

So far the fish I've caught:
Fresh Fish
Salty White Fish
Iceclad Cutlass Fish

All basically the same frequency in catch.

Edited, Sat Mar 29 07:29:59 2003
